accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text: the title, the amendment to Section 201(d), and the legislative history are accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the codification reference and amendment details match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes/extends funding to monitor, assess, and research the Great Lakes Basin.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly describes the amendment to Section 201(d) of the Further Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2020 (16 U.S.C. 941h(d)).

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions or carve-outs to summarize.

effective_dates.why: Notes the approval date and the extension of authorization through 2030, matching the bill.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: striking 2025 and inserting 2030 to extend authorization.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and factual with no editorializing.

concise.why: Brief and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Act, statute, and codification reference.

correct_figures.why: The years 2025/2030 and the dates (Dec. 26, 2025; Nov. 19; Dec. 15) all match the bill.
